text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
The racers up front set a brutally high pace. There was seemingly 
little hope of catching up, but then… Narita Brian overtook them all 
and seized the win!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Not only was it a Satsuki Sho record, she set a new top time for the 
2 000-meter Nakayama track!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What a heart-pounding race! The thunder of applause from the stands 
won't stop!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Wha… What was that explosion on the final stretch?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
This is a G1 race, but those other racers looked like toddlers! I had no 
idea Narita Brian was so good!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She gets a landslide three-length lead, with a course record to boot. 
And yet she stands there, looking disappointed the race ended so 
soon.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, Brian… Even on the track, you're still my greedy little sister.
The Classics are prestigious races as it is — and that win was phenomenal.

It cemented Narita Brian's reputation: she's the best racer of the 
generation.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Exhale…

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoo, Brian's outta this world… Every single lap is a new personal 
best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I know she ran an amazing race in the Satsuki Sho, but who would've 
thought she had this much more potential?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Look at that — even the onlookers are standing there dumbstruck.

She shoots past our expectations every run. I've had to revamp her 
training routine over and over.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph…
Nice going, Brian. You're getting comfortable with that running style.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Low center of gravity, right? I heard you two created it together when 
you scouted her.

I gave some advice, but Brian's the one who made it work. I was 
blown away the first time I saw it.

I gave some advice, but Brian's the one who made it work. I was 
blown away the first time I saw it.
All right, let's finish off with one more lap.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Just one? Then I'll take it seriously. Get that stopwatch ready.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Say what? You weren't serious this whole time?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: …You may need to rework that training routine again.
Looks like it…

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Brian! Do you have time for a quick question?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoa, what the heck?! We're in the middle of training here!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry to interrupt, but I couldn't get a hold of Narita Brian 
anywhere else. This is the only chance I've got!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If it means that much to you… I've got you covered! What's your 
question?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: …I'll let you handle it. I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Aaah, wait! Just one thing!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You ran a beautiful race at the Satsuki Sho, but what's next for you? 
Will you try to become the fifth ever Triple Crown champion?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: …They're all just stepping stones.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Stepping stones? H-Hey, what exactly do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Exactly as she said.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Winning the Triple Crown is not enough to satisfy her hunger.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I thought I'd find you here.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's a flood of reporters down at the training grounds, trying to 
find you for an interview.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey Sis…

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
At the Satsuki Sho… the leaders set a breakneck pace from the start. 
Usually, everyone would be worn out by the final straight.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, you met the challenge, and when everyone else ran out 
of steam, you shot through to victory.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's no wonder you've thrown everyone into an uproar.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I didn't mean to do anything special. It didn't feel particularly fast to 
me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I know all too well there are racers out there who could've run faster.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You've caused quite a stir in the racing world with your astounding 
win, but you still don't seem happy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I wonder when exactly that appetite of yours will be sated.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I suggest you use the back entrance to the dorms. There aren't any 
reporters on that side.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You've found yourself a good team — your wins are proof of that. I'll 
be watching what you do next.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
When will my appetite be sated? You should know that better than 
anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It'll be the day I beat you.
